name: Sonatype Nexus Repository Pro
license: Proprietary/commercial (Pro tier). Built on the same codebase as the free Community Edition, which is Eclipse Public License v1.0 (LICENSE.txt in github.com/sonatype/nexus-public).
cost: Commercial license. Sonatype's pricing page lists self-hosted Pro "starting at $1,620/year + consumption" (cloud blob-store storage tiered from ~$1.10/GB/month); on-premises/air-gapped deployments are quote-only. AWS Marketplace lists Pro (Self-Hosted) annual subscriptions in the ~$12k range. Enterprise platform deals (Repository bundled with Lifecycle/Firewall) commonly run $40k-$300k+/yr. A free Community Edition covers the non-Pro feature set. List prices negotiable; quote-based.
language: Java (JVM application; ExtJS web UI, Groovy/Kotlin in places)
perf_notes: JVM service; deployments size heap to repository load (commonly 4GB+; Storage Planning docs guide sizing). Metadata lives in a relational DB (embedded H2 for trials, external PostgreSQL for production) and artifacts in a separate blob store, so I/O scales with the chosen storage backend rather than the app. v3.88 removed Elasticsearch and moved fully to SQL search, reducing memory footprint. Sonatype publishes no public throughput/latency benchmarks.
scale_notes: Pro adds High Availability / resilient active-active deployments (multiple nodes sharing one external PostgreSQL and a shared/cloud blob store; HA on Kubernetes from the 3.71+ resilient architecture). Community Edition is single-node. Used at enterprise scale (millions of components, multi-TB blob stores) across 30+ package formats. A managed SaaS sibling, Nexus Repository Cloud, also exists.
summary: Sonatype's commercial universal artifact repository: a self-hosted, multi-format (PyPI, Maven, npm, Docker, etc.) proxy/hosted/group server whose Pro tier adds HA clustering, SAML SSO, audit logging, cloud blob stores, and supply-chain integrations.
extras: Universal repository: 30+ formats (Maven, npm, Docker, NuGet, Go, Conda, Helm, Hugging Face, Cargo, RubyGems, APT, Yum, R, Raw, Alpine/APK, etc.) in one server
Routing rules + content selectors for path/regex-based access control and blocking private names from reaching upstream
Content replication between Nexus instances and repository import/export (Pro-only)
Tight integration with Sonatype Lifecycle (IQ Server) and Sonatype Repository Firewall for proxy-stage quarantine, malware blocking, CVE policy, license policy, and SBOM (separately licensed add-ons)

PyPI proxy mirrors each version's yanked status since v3.43.0; PEP 658 inline metadata + PEP 714 field names + PEP 691 JSON Simple API added for hosted and proxy PyPI repos in v3.93.0 (clients: pip 23.1+, uv 0.1.0+, Poetry 1.8+), alongside the existing PEP 503 HTML Simple API. PEP 700/629/740 not documented
Azure Blob and Google Cloud blob stores, SAML SSO, user tokens, HA/resilient deployment, and audit logging are Pro-only per the Nexus feature matrix; LDAP is in Community Edition too
Comprehensive REST API + System/API (Swagger) console; metrics endpoints incl. native Prometheus exporter
Managed SaaS sibling product, Nexus Repository Cloud, with consumption pricing
Signs APT/Yum repository metadata with GPG (does not sign PyPI artifacts)
